name: Almond Ricotta Custard
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Press moisture out of the ricotta cheese.
3. Scald the milk and pour over the beaten eggs.
4. Pour the mixture into a blender or food processor and add the rest of the ingredients.
5. Beat until combined.
6. Pour into a shallow buttered dish.
7. Dust with cinnamon or nutmeg.
8. Sprinkle thin sliced almonds on top.
9. Set the casserole dish in a larger pan partially filled with hot water.
10. Cook for 45 minutes at 350°F.
11. To test if done, insert a knife near the edge of the dish. If the knife comes out clean, the custard will be done when cool.
12. Let cool before serving. Top with chocolate curls if desired.
